defects.description: Reusable operating model could transfer Tesamorelin assumptions to BPC-157
defects.resolution: Target-specific reconstruction and explicit no-transfer field

defects.description: Regulatory proposal could be represented as final action
A recruiting trial could be represented as proof of effectiveness or safety
defects.resolution: Human-evidence gap model tracks results separately and fails closed

defects.description: Architecture repeatability could be judged only by approval outcomes
defects.resolution: REPEATABLE_WITH_HOLD is a valid result when target-specific evidence justifies the hold
